evals.prompt: You are working inside an Express pricing app directory. Add Softprobe to this app for HTTP traffic capture and replay. Get it fully integrated and working. Start the server on TARGET_PORT and capture GET /price?sku=coffee-beans with trace ID aabbccdd00000001aabbccdd00000001. Report PASS or FAIL with the cassette file path.
evals.expected_output: instrumentation.js created with require('@softprobe/softprobe-js/init') before OTel NodeSDK setup and sdk.start(). .softprobe/config.yml created. package.json start script uses 'node -r ./instrumentation.js server.js'. Cassette aabbccdd00000001aabbccdd00000001.ndjson written to cassettes/. Reports PASS.

evals.prompt: You are working inside an Express pricing app directory. Integrate Softprobe for HTTP traffic capture and replay. Start the server on TARGET_PORT, capture GET /price?sku=coffee-beans with trace ID aabbccdd00000002aabbccdd00000002, then replay and verify it matches the live service. Report whether the replay passed.
evals.expected_output: Full bootstrap set up correctly. Cassette written at cassettes/aabbccdd00000002aabbccdd00000002.ndjson. Replay run against live server, output shows PASS with no mismatches.

evals.prompt: You are working inside an Express app directory that has Softprobe partially set up but something is broken. Figure out what's wrong, fix it, then capture GET /price?sku=coffee-beans with trace ID aabbccdd00000003aabbccdd00000003 and replay to verify. Report what was broken and whether the final replay passed.
evals.expected_output: The import @softprobe/softprobe-js/init must be the first line and before Otel import. Identify the softprobe-js/init after Otel as the problem. Fixes instrumentation.js to import @softprobe/softprobe-js/init as the first line. Cassette written. Replay passes.
